name: Grilled Thai Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Green onion; white part, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler and brush rack lightly with oil.
2. Place chicken breasts on rack. Broil 3 inches from heat source for 6-7 minutes or until cooked through, turning breasts over after 4 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, combine lettuce, green onion, red onion, and cilantro in a large bowl; toss to mix well.
4. To make dressing, combine vinegar, olive oil, soy sauce, and crushed red pepper in a small bowl; mix thoroughly.
5. To serve, place greens on plates.
6. Slice chicken and arrange on greens.
7. Drizzle each serving with dressing.
